results.title: Sanofi launches AI-powered agent for sales representatives
results.description: Built on Snowflake Cortex AI, the agent enables representatives to generate comprehensive pre-call plans through a single conversational interface

results.title: Lupin secures U.S. FDA approval for interchangeable biosimilar Ranibizumab
results.description: Ranluspec is the only interchangeable ranibizumab biosimilar approved in the United States in both vial and pre-filled syringe (PFS) presentations

results.title: Dr. L H Hiranandani Hospital expands cancer care with advanced radiation therapy unit
results.description: The addition of the Halcyon system represents a significant milestone in the hospital’s oncology services

results.title: Alembic Pharma receives USFDA approval for Haloperidol tablets
results.description: The approved product is therapeutically equivalent to Haldol tablets of Ortho McNeil Pharmaceutical
